component_identification.content: 36 point cards, 43 merchant/action cards, 105 wooden cubes (turmeric yellow, saffron red, cardamom green, cinnamon brown), 4 wooden bowls, and rulebook.

core_game_loop.content: On your turn choose one action: play a merchant card, acquire a new merchant card from market, claim a point card, or rest to pick up your played cards. Merchant cards upgrade, trade, or harvest spices to build your engine. Point cards convert spices into points and can grant endgame bonuses. Fast, clean turns continue clockwise.

detailed_rules.content: Play card: execute effect exactly; upgrade cards may improve cubes to next value color chain (yellow->red->green->brown), trade cards swap specified sets, harvest cards gain cubes shown. Acquire merchant card: take one from six-card row, paying one cube onto each skipped card; collect cubes on taken card. Claim point card: spend required cubes from hand to take one available point card and optionally bonus token if present. Rest action returns all played merchant cards to hand (no other effect). Hand management is central: you cannot play cards not in hand and cannot partially ignore mandatory exchange losses on some cards unless text allows optional repeats. Cube supply in bowls is shared bank but practically sufficient.

scoring_and_endgame.content: Game ends immediately when a player claims their fifth point card in 2-3 player game or sixth in 4-5 player game. Finish round so all players have equal turns, then total points from claimed cards plus gold/silver bonus tokens. Highest score wins; tie broken by most cubes remaining then shared as needed.

beginner_strategy.content: Build an early conversion ladder (upgrade + efficient trade) before racing expensive point cards. Buying a market card with several cubes on it can be stronger than its printed effect alone. Don’t over-upgrade into brown cubes without point cards that actually pay for them. Time your rest so you can chain two or three high-impact plays before pausing. Watch endgame pace: if opponent nears 5/6 cards, pivot from engine growth to immediate claim value.

metadata.notes: Passed structural/source gate (Checks 1-6). Pending manual content accuracy review (Checks 7-12) before approval.
